sections.paragraph:
masc. adj.-

(1) pierced through, hence mortallywounded, Job 24:12 Psa 69:27 Jer 51:52, and often slain, in battle, Deu 21:1, Deu 21:2, Deu 21:3, Deu 21:6. חֲלַל חֶרֶב slain with the sword, Num 19:16 and figuratively, for the sake of the antithesis, חַלְלֵי רָעָב those slain by hunger, Lam 4:9 compare Isa 22:2.

(2) profane (see the verb Piel No. 3). Eze 21:30 f. חֲלָלָה (standing in connection with זֹונָה) profaned, i.e. a harlot, Lev 21:7, 14 Lev 21:14. As to the active signification of one who pierces through, i.e. a soldier, which some have proposed, see Comment. on Isa 22:2.
